message:
fix(oracle): use severity() for cancel monotonicity check

The NonMonotonicCancel check compared CancelKind by discriminant ordering
which disagrees with CancelReason::strengthen() severity ordering. LinkedExit
(disc 10, sev 3) was considered stronger than Shutdown (disc 9, sev 5) by
the oracle but weaker by strengthen(), producing false negatives/positives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
